# ChochKlah

> YouTube Partnered variety content creator, speedrunner, and proud dad. Specialising in indie games, honest reviews, and let's plays.

## About

ChochKlah is a YouTube Partnered content creator focused on variety gaming and indie games. What started as a hobby sharing cool video games has grown into a passion. ChochKlah loves finding hidden gems in the indie game scene, experiencing wildly creative stories, and shining a spotlight on hardworking developers. Known for high energy, crisp production value, non-stop laughs, and top-tier memery.

## Content

- Variety gaming — you never quite know what's coming next
- Indie game discovery — hidden gems, creative stories, developer spotlights
- Speedrunning
- Let's plays and game reviews

## Pages

- [Home](https://chochklah.com): About, social links, and contact
- [Contact](https://chochklah.com/contact): Business inquiries, sponsorships, and collaborations
